project.name: DABT Tutor
project.description: Study preparation for the DABT certification examination (October 15, 2026)

exam_format.passing: Modified Angoff standard setting; ~72% historical pass rate

I. Conduct of Toxicological Studies.status: UNDERWEIGHT — largest sub-domain (Interpret 16%) has best DB coverage

III. Risk Assessment.status: CRITICAL — 55 knowledge topics but only 210 Qs; 172/210 have no sub-domain assigned

IV. Applied Toxicology.status: OVERWEIGHT — 60% of DB for 13% of exam; useful for targeted organ-system drilling

quality.notes: Bloom levels need full population. Explanations need writing for remaining 3,387 Qs.

domain_iii_detail.notes: No questions assigned to Hazard ID, Exposure Assessment, or Dose Response Assessment sub-domains. Full sub-domain classification of the 172 unassigned Qs is needed before synthetic question generation.

legacy.status: Superseded by SQLite. Backward compat only.

handbook.status: Wired into reference search pipeline as of 2026-05-20

not_searchable.notes: Mid-Amer Tox Course summaries, C&D Chapter Support slides/notes/lectures, and Study_Aids are intentionally excluded — user determined they add noise.

past_exams_undigested.name: Mini-ABT 1-11
past_exams_undigested.ingested: Partial — 446 Qs from legacy xlsx in DB; full docx pairs exist as originals

exam_materials.notes: Raw PDFs and PPTX from recert exams not yet extracted. Some content bled into DB via compiled recert xlsx (767 Qs from 2008-2014) but original vignettes and answer justifications are untapped.

domain_iii_conservation.action: When unseen Domain III Qs fall below threshold, flag to user and pivot to textbook-based RA study (Casarett Ch.4, Hayes Ch.3, EPA guidelines)

curriculum.status: EXISTS — structured with sub-domains, topics, and prerequisites. Cross-reference with exam_blueprint for alignment. Needs review/user discussion.
curriculum.notes: Appears to be a study progression map with domain weight percentages that match the handbook. May have been auto-generated or built by a previous session. Not yet consumed by any skill.

learner.name: Abud
learner.strengths: Strong reasoning under uncertainty, narrows to 2 choices reliably, well-calibrated metacognition
learner.analogy_preference: Production-line metaphors for biochemical pathways, comparative frameworks for cross-topic consolidation
learner.tone_preference: Practitioner-level treatment — no regression to Novice/Apprentice. Exam-trap framing. Fact dumps rejected in favor of comparison-driven understanding.

dabt-database.function: SQLite query interface, domain-weighted sampling, question retrieval

dabt-deep-dive.function: Socratic tutoring, first-principles builds, mandatory summary artifacts

dabt-drill-mode.function: Quiz engine, blueprint-weighted sets, session state, diagnostic blocks

dabt-reference.function: Three-pass full-text search over extracted references, citation formatting

dabt-notebook.function: Lightweight markdown concept notebook for study notes

profile-call.function: Persona trigger — Mike → loads all 6 DABT skills

config_consumption.status: Skills hardcode paths and weights. Just patched to read exam_blueprint section of this config. Long-term: all skills should read this file at session start for paths, weights, and targets.

1_synthetic_questions.title: Build synthetic DABT-style MCQs for underweight domains
1_synthetic_questions.scope: Domain III (Risk Assessment) → target 600 Qs. Domain I (Conduct of Studies) → target 1,600 Qs.

3a_explanations.title: Write explanations for questions that lack them
3a_explanations.scope: ~3,387 questions without explanations; one explanation each (1-3 sentences: mechanism + trap + citation)

3b_bloom_levels.title: Classify all questions by cognitive level

criteria.remember-understand: Recall facts, definitions, or recognize correct statements
criteria.apply: Apply concepts to novel scenarios, calculate, interpret data
criteria.analyze: Compare, differentiate, integrate multiple concepts, weight of evidence

4_curriculum_topics.title: Review and decide on curriculum/topics.json
4_curriculum_topics.scope: Existing file at curriculum/topics.json with 5 domain entries and sub-structure. Needs user discussion.

5_integrated_workflow.title: Make skills consume dabt-config.json at runtime
5_integrated_workflow.scope: Patch all 6 DABT skills to read paths/weights/targets from this config instead of hardcoding
5_integrated_workflow.notes: exam-weights.json predecessor already created; this config supersedes it. Skills patched to read exam_blueprint weights; still need to patch path resolution.

6_digest_past_exams.title: Extract raw recert exam files into DB and/or reference pipeline
6_digest_past_exams.scope: 2013 recert (6 files), 2015 recert (13 files), 2017 cert (4 files), Mini-ABT 1-11 (22 docx), Tox 2000 notecards
